research_question: Find non-dilutive R&D funding for a Berkeley-based advanced-materials small business developing structural color coatings.

company_profile.name: Cypris Materials
company_profile.description: A U.S. small business developing structural color coatings — paints and inks that generate color through self-assembled polymer nanostructures rather than pigments, dyes, metals, or PCBs. Target markets include industrial printing, automotive, cosmetics, and general coatings. Berkeley, California.
constraints: prefer programs without matching-fund requirements when feasible
conservative on eligibility — only surface programs we can credibly win
exclude grants already in the known_grants list
